notes: Antigravity subagent orphan cleanup, UNBLOCKED by subagent linking. The recipe spawns parent + 1 foreground subagent, waits for parent_linked, then SIGKILLs the parent's agy process so both parent and the orphaned child are reaped without a clean exit. OBSERVABILITY CORRECTION (live 2026-06-20): unlike claudecode, the antigravity PARENT conv-id session is pid=0 on a single-prompt turn (agy writes the conversationId<->workspace pairing to history.jsonl only on the 2nd prompt, so the conv-id never binds a PID — see cell 1.3). The agy process death IS detected via the transient proc-<pid> PRE-session's process_exited (raw recording), but that pre-session is unlinked to the conv-id, so the curator drops it and the curated fixture carries NO process_exited for the parent conv-id. The orphaned child (pid=0, runs inside the parent's invoke, no own agy process) is therefore reaped NOT by a parent process_exited cascade but by the subagent-orphan path: when the parent's turn is observed done with no open tools, the child transitions working->ready with reason 'subagent orphaned (parent turn done, no open tools)' and is then swept ('parent finished — child cleanup'). The #321 invariant holds: after the orphan reap the child does NOT get a spurious working/waiting transition. Model harvested from <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> ('Gemini 3.1 Pro'). Tokens/cost NOT in the antigravity JSONL.

text: Parent conv-id session appears in ready when transcript.jsonl is written
The spawn prompt drives the parent ready -> working
The subagent's own conversation transcript materializes at brain/<child>/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl (a distinct new session from the parent)
AntigravityParentConvID binds child.session_id -> parent.session_id (the orphan-cleanup precondition: the child is a linked subagent before the kill)
The freshly-spawned child goes working as it begins its task (this is its one legitimate working transition — it must NOT work again after the orphan reap)

invariants: no state_transition to working for child
no state_transition to waiting for child
text: After SIGKILL, the parent turn is observed done with no open tools, so the orphaned child transitions working -> ready ('subagent orphaned') and does NOT bounce back to working/waiting (issue #321 invariant — no spurious working transition for the reaped child)
The orphaned child is then swept ('parent finished — child cleanup'), draining SubagentCount to 0 — no stale subagent badge
